About Ziny Proxy...

Develop • Track • Scrape • Bypass
We are Ziny Proxy, our values lay on security and anonymity of our customers.
  • Residential proxy servers in 195+ geo locations
  • Undetected, Anti-Fraud, Scamscore 0
Sign Up with Ziny Proxy

Who Are We?

The launch of Ziny Proxy came together after we saw the proxy industry offering many compromises through unreliable IPs, privacy scandals in the industry and vague policies while providers ignored user experience. so we decided to make a change.

 

Ziny Proxy stands for unrestricted internet access alongside strong user privacy and dependable performance worldwide. Our mission is simple: Our secure and quality proxy solutions give users complete control over their internet experience.

 

Our clients benefit from a wide-reaching proxy network which we ethically obtain from all 195 countries while maintaining stability and legal compliance. Our infrastructure provides scalable support whether you’re working with data scraping, account management or operational security.

Our proprietary filtration system enables us to maintain one of the market’s cleanest IP pools which operates by constantly detecting and removing flagged or low-quality IPs thus ensuring your connections stay smooth, undetected and effective.

 

With 24/7 customer support, full protocol compatibility (HTTP/SOCKS5), and a strong commitment to privacy and freedom, Ziny Proxy is more than just a proxy provider, we’re your only trusted partner in the digital world.

 

Sign Up and Get access to Unrestricted and Unlimited Proxies for Any Use Case

Why choose Us...?

Bypass IP restriction

Bypass IP restrictions with our proxies (All plans include HTTP & SOCKs5 protocols)

Locations

Proxy servers in over 195+ regions, worldwide coverage.

Easy To Use Dashboard

Manage your account, proxy usage, stats, whitelist your IPs and more.

GDPR

CCPA

Anti-Fraud

Refer Ziny and receive 5GB FREE USAGE.

Get Ziny Proxies

Drive better decisions with data

Get hold of the data that matters, with solutions to help you with data collection, access business-critical information, and gain a competitive edge.

Data collection

Gather public data without interruptions. Bypass website blocker and CAPTCHAs seamlessly.

Social media

Manage multiple social accounts accross different platforums. Advertising accounts managment with security and reliability.

Price comparison and monitoring

Track competitor prices on selling platforms such as Amazon, Etsy, eBay and more. Stay ahead by knowing the market and your competition.

Consumer trends

Get insight on you ideal customers, make business marketing decisions to reach your customers.

Advanced cybersecurity

Protect your website from data breaches and fight off threats.

Brand protection

Protect your brand by detecting counterfeit / copy-cats of your product, ads, unauthorized copyright use. Protect your brand.
